data.title: U.S. mortgage market sees a surge as borrowing costs drop, with mortgage application volume jumping 29.7% in a week. Refinancing activity is up 57.7%, with the benchmark 30-year fixed mortgage rate at 6.39%.
data.description: The U.S. mortgage market is experiencing a significant uptick as borrowing costs plummeted, prompting a surge in refinancing activity. During the week ending Sept. 12, total mortgage application volume increased by 29.7%, the largest weekly gain since January. The 30-year fixed mortgage rate dropped by 10 basis points to 6.39%, the lowest level in nearly a year. Refinancing activity soared by 57.7%, with the Mortgage Refinance Index reaching its highest level since March 2022. The surge in refinancing indicates that homeowners are proactively locking in savings ahead of the expected interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. MBA's chief economist noted that borrowers are moving swiftly in anticipation of lower rates, with refinance application volume spiking almost 60% from the prior week.

data.title: Dow Jones acquires Eco-Movement, a global platform for EV charging data. Eco-Movement to be part of OPIS.
data.description: In a recent development, Dow Jones has successfully completed the acquisition of Eco-Movement, a prominent worldwide platform specializing in EV charging station data. This strategic acquisition positions Eco-Movement as an integral component of OPIS, Dow Jones’s expanding energy division. Based in Utrecht, Netherlands, Eco-Movement is at the forefront of charge point data platforms, excelling in gathering, refining, and enhancing EV charging station data. The company's comprehensive data platform encompasses public and semi-public EV charging points, along with their up-to-the-minute availability status.

data.title: ADC market to double to $9 billion by 2030, from $4.5 billion in 2024, driven by digital acceleration and rising security demands.
data.description: A report on the Application Delivery Controllers (ADCs) Market has recently been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market is valued at around US$4.5 billion in 2024 and is expected to exceed US$9 billion by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.5%. The global report delves into the ADC market, examining Product Types, Company Types, and Industry Sectors both globally and regionally.

data.title: LEO Pharma shares Phase 3 Delgocitinib Cream results for adolescents with Chronic Hand Eczema.
data.description: In Ballerup, Denmark, LEO Pharma recently showcased groundbreaking Phase 3 data on Delgocitinib Cream for adolescents with moderate to severe Chronic Hand Eczema (CHE). This late-breaking study revealed significant insights into the effectiveness of the cream in managing this condition. This demonstrates LEO Pharma’s commitment to developing solutions for skin conditions.

data.title: SUI price soars by 8.85% to $3.89, as technical indicators show bullish signals, approaching key resistance at $3.91.
data.description: The price of SUI has surged to $3.89 due to notable bullish momentum, accompanied by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) reaching 61.24 and Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicating a likely continuation of the trend. Investors are closely monitoring the key resistance level at $3.91 as a potential breakout point.

data.title: AUMOVIO, formerly Continental's Automotive sector, debuts on Frankfurt Stock Exchange as independent company.
data.description: In Germany, AUMOVIO SE (formally Continental's Automotive group sector) debuted today as an independent entity, commencing trading on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. AUMOVIO is a prominent worldwide supplier of vehicle hardware and software solutions, firmly positioned in critical growth sectors influencing the future of mobility. With substantial support from a diverse global clientele, AUMOVIO prioritizes growth driven by value.

data.title: Global ERP software market valued at US$60 billion in 2024, expected to reach US$119 billion by 2030 with CAGR of 12.1%. Leading vendors focus on UX innovation, intelligent automation, vertical platforms.
data.description: A report on global Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Software has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market, valued at US$60 billion in 2024, is projected to reach US$119 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.1%. This comprehensive report explores the ERP market on a worldwide and regional scale, focusing on Deployment Type, Company Type, Application Type, and Industry Sector from 2021 to 2030.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® hosting MORE THAN PINK Walks in New England in Oct to raise $595,000 in MA and $375,000 in CT.
data.description: In Boston, Susan G. Komen®, a renowned breast cancer organization, will host the Massachusetts MORE THAN PINK Walk on Oct. 18 and the Connecticut MORE THAN PINK Walk on Oct. 26. These events bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer, and supporters to raise funds for Komen's mission. The goal is to raise $595,000 at the Massachusetts Walk and $375,000 at the Connecticut Walk. Such gatherings play a vital role in building community support and financial backing for breast cancer research and support initiatives.
